BaseField.Name: Label62
BaseField.Text: Instructions:Please enter the square feet for the situation that applies.

BaseField.Name: Label78
BaseField.Text: Has a building that used domestic water been removed from this property?

BaseField.Name: Label112
BaseField.Text: Category (a) Exemptions from All Impact Fees.

BaseField.Name: Label123
BaseField.Text: Category (b) Exemptions From Specific Impact Fees.

BaseField.Name: Label114
BaseField.Text: This is a replacement of a destroyed or partially destroyed residential structure with a new structure of the same use and number of dwelling units within 15 years of the demolition of the previous structure.

BaseField.Name: Label125
BaseField.Text: There is a “category” exemption pursuant to a writ-ten agreement or approval between the City and a developer which was entered into prior to June 1,2002, and which specifically required the developer to finance part or all of the construction of Impact Fee Facilities. If yes, check which exemptions apply:

BaseField.Name: Label116
BaseField.Text: This is a replacement of a destroyed or partially destroyed nonresidential structure with a new structure of the same gross floor area and use, and replacement is within 15 years after the demolition of the previous structure.

BaseField.Name: Label118
BaseField.Text: This is an installation or replacement of a mobile home on a lot or site where all impact fees for such lot or site have previously been paid or where a mobile home legally existed prior to June 2, 2003.

BaseField.Name: Label120
BaseField.Text: This is a room addition/remodeling, rehabilitation or other improvements to an existing structure, and there is no increase in the number of dwelling units or in the gross square footage for nonresidential use.

BaseField.Name: Label129
BaseField.Text: The Bureau of Fire Prevention requires that the water meter be increased in size above that required for the ordinary usage of a building.

BaseField.Name: Label122
BaseField.Text: Construction pursuant to a building permit application submitted prior to June 2, 2003. The construction must proceed according to the terms of the building permit.

BaseField.Name: Label131
BaseField.Text: There is a separate water meter connected only to an irrigation system and not to any building or facility for human occupancy.

BaseField.Name: Label133
BaseField.Text: The Bureau of Fire Prevention requires that the water meter be increased in size above that required for the ordinary usage of a building.

BaseField.Name: Label136
BaseField.Text: This housing is sold to a household whose income is 60% or less of the area median gross income adjusted for a household size. (See NOTE: below)

BaseField.Name: Label149
BaseField.Text: Neighborhood Parks and Trail Exclusion Area.

BaseField.Name: Label138
BaseField.Text: This housing is sold to a household whose income is more than 60% but is 80% or less of the area median gross income adjusted for a household size.(See NOTE: below)

BaseField.Name: Label151
BaseField.Text: This is a Tenant-Occupied unit which is restricted to rental to a household whose income is 60% or less of the area median gross income adjusted for household size.

BaseField.Name: Label140
BaseField.Text: NOTE: If housing is not sold at time of building permit issuance, then impact fee must be paid. Applicant can apply for refund within 30 days of occupancy of unit, if unit is later sold to qualifying household.

BaseField.Name: Label153
BaseField.Text: This is a Tenant-Occupied unit which is restricted to rental to a household whose income is 80% or less of the area median gross income adjusted for a household size.

BaseField.Name: Label155
BaseField.Text: This is development by any governmental entity for which the governmental entity has the statutory power of eminent domain, such as the County, City, State or Federal government.

BaseField.Name: Label162
BaseField.Text: This is development by the Housing Authority of the City of Lincoln.

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

FormScriptItem.Name: SaveSpecialPermit
Form_onEventsEnd
Form_onLoad
btnSave_onClick
btnTabFourTwo_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: alert('This is another active tab button.');
